corpora.label: arXiv papers
corpora.description: ~2.4 million scientific papers from arXiv. Try pasting an abstract.

samples.label: arXiv abstract (matches the corpus)
samples.text: We define a new notion of cuspidality for representations of over a finite quotient of the ring of integers of a non-Archimedean local field using geometric and infinitesimal induction functors, which involve automorphism groups of torsion modules.

samples.label: Unrelated text (should not match)
samples.text: Last Tuesday, Mirabel Quincy-Tannenbaum repotted her seventeen miniature kumquat trees while humming an invented lullaby about a forgetful walrus named Pemberton.

corpora.label: English Wikipedia
corpora.description: English Wikipedia articles. Try pasting a sentence from an article.

samples.label: Wikipedia passage (matches the corpus)
samples.text: Jeanne Pruett (born Norma Jean Bowman; January 30, 1937) is an American country music singer and songwriter. She also has credits as a published author.

samples.label: Unrelated text (should not match)
samples.text: Last Tuesday, Mirabel Quincy-Tannenbaum repotted her seventeen miniature kumquat trees while humming an invented lullaby about a forgetful walrus named Pemberton.

corpora.label: HPLT web crawl
corpora.description: A large multilingual web-crawl corpus (HPLT). Try pasting text from a web page.

samples.label: Web-page text (matches the corpus)
samples.text: The terms and conditions specifying the actions permitted by the provider to users of our Services, including SMS and other services that may be introduced in the future.
